Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AMILIANO SANTIAGO, Hearing on Petition for Approval of Transfer of Structured Settlement Payment Rights. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition for Approval of Transfer of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is Granted. No opposition filed.
